meaning: n.演说,致辞,叙述法 [语]引语
examples: It is not necessary to set down the rest of the oration.
The opening lines of Machiavelli’sdedication recall the classical oration To Nicoles composed by the Greek rhetorician Isocrates.
Please let our rector make the oration first, clap your hands.
Paul resumed his oration, snacking on candy at the dinner hour while continuing to speak.
It's hard enough to sit through a Giscard oration at the best of times.
